top_5_fixes: Add optional warning mode to report nearing-expiry evidence before hard-fail thresholds.
Emit per-item max-age policy source in validation output for easier auditability.
Add tests for unknown SourceTag types and unknown EvidenceID prefixes fallback behavior.
Align SourceTag type enum between schema and validator config to prevent drift.
Create scheduled CI job to detect policy threshold drift against governance standards.
